## Checklist
- [ ] My PR title describes the change clearly
- [ ] I ran the app/tests locally and they pass
- [ ] I kept the scope focused (one change-set)
- [ ] I removed debug prints/breakpoints and temporary files
- [ ] I updated docs/README if behavior or usage changed
